anomalies.wf: TQS / PR Code Quality Reviewer / Design Decision Gate / Matt Pocock Skills Reviewer
anomalies.detail: Activation job 'Cannot find module check_daily_effective_workflow_guardrail.cjs' on all 4 PR review workflows of branch copilot/fix-daily-credit-limit-test. Agent correctly SKIPPED but activation failure reds the run. Dev-confined to the feature PR developing the daily-credit guardrail; packaging gap that would hit main if merged unbundled. 4/8 fails this window.
ABSENT 2026-06-07: not observed in any of 28 copilot runs. Was the single biggest driver 06-06 (6/16). Tentatively fixed; one more clean window to close.
RECUR 06-07 on 1 prod-main schedule (Safe Output Integrator): denies read(*_test.go)/shell(sed), 13 denials, 5-denial abort. Down from 3 wf on 06-06. sdk-driver path now 1/8 fails (minimatch gone).
Agent OK (turns=3) but detection job reddened: ERR_PARSE no THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT despite continue-on-error=true.
21.48M eff this window, comfortably UNDER the 25M cap (was 25.37M over-cap 06-05, 25.12M 429-fail 06-04). token-budget-429 quiet. Watch continues but trending safe.

RECUR 3rd consecutive day: 400 'This model does not support the effort parameter' (run 27104658186, now retries 1/11) on prod main schedule; all retries exhausted, 0 tokens. Unfixed 3 days — static config, should be a one-line frontmatter fix.

RECUR 3rd consecutive day: 404 'Model not found gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07' (run 27101492605) on prod main schedule. Model id ROTATED from adelie-alpha-2026-02-19 but STILL 404 — chasing a moving endpoint; needs a valid/aliased model id, not another pin.
25.37M effective tokens (OVER the 25M cap) yet SUCCEEDED. Top eff-tok of the window. token-budget-429 did not trigger but the workflow sits at the cap edge across multiple windows.
Was 25.12M/25M 429 failure on 06-04; on 06-05 the same workflow ran 25.37M and succeeded. Folded into anom-ambient-over-cap-survived.
06-04 all-tools-denied -> 600s idle timeout. 06-05: PR Code Quality Reviewer 2/2 success. Not observed.
06-04 reddened 2 prod wf. 06-05: PR Sous Chef 5/5 + Contribution Check 1/1 success. Not observed.
